title: goniopteris aspera
intro: Goniopteris aspera, also known as the rough shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. The medicinal properties of Goniopteris aspera include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Goniopteris aspera can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal use, and it is often used in herbal remedies in traditional medicine.
